notableEvents.label: Angel Martínez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez hit by pitch. Steven Kwan to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: José Ramírez reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Steven Kwan scores. Angel Martínez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: José Ramírez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: José Ramírez reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Steven Kwan scores. Angel Martínez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Travis Bazzana steals (6) 3rd base. Brayan Rocchio steals (5) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: José Ramírez reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Steven Kwan scores. Angel Martínez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: José Ramírez reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Steven Kwan scores. Angel Martínez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Jeffers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Jeffers grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Byron Buxton scores. Austin Martin out at 2nd. Ryan Jeffers out at 1st.
